title: create_region
description: Create a vector region from a coarse point outline. The engine fits smooth Bézier curves to the outline using the supplied geometric constraints.

outline.description: Point coordinate pairs in normalized space (0.0–1.0). Keep to 3–30 points for best quality.

closed.description: Whether the outline forms a closed loop (last point connects to first).

smoothness.description: Curve smoothness 0.0–1.0. 0.0 = sharp/polygonal, 0.2–0.5 = mixed rigid/organic, 0.6–0.8 = organic/curved, 1.0 = very loose. See §4.5d for per-category guidance.

fill.description: Fill color as hex string, or null/omitted for no fill.

stroke.description: Stroke color as hex string, or null/omitted for no stroke.

stroke_width.description: Stroke width in normalized units (as fraction of shorter canvas dimension).

stroke_width_px.description: Stroke width in canvas pixels. Overrides stroke_width when provided.

metadata_tags.description: Optional semantic tags (stored as opaque strings — engine never interprets).
